prompt: Estimate or interpret the measurable condition and state why it is out of tolerance.
scenario: You are on a manufacturing or assembly floor running standard work with quality gates. The work under review is Production welding, part of the Assembly & Fabrication scope. The observed field condition is: fillet gauge fail (ME). The work is roughed in — installed or assembled, but not yet closed out. Reference material on hand: AWS D1.1/D1.3, shop WPS. The measurable cue is visible enough to estimate whether the condition is within tolerance.
title: Measurement check: Production welding (production floor)
